name: OfficeCLI
description: Reads, edits, and creates Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files from the command line with no Office install — a single binary built for AI agents to automate documents. 18k+ GitHub stars, Apache-2.0.

skills.name: Word Document Editing
skills.description: Reads and edits .docx files including text, styles, tables, and images programmatically without a Microsoft Office install.

skills.name: Excel Automation
skills.description: Creates and modifies .xlsx spreadsheets including cells, formulas, and sheets for agent-driven data workflows.

skills.name: PowerPoint Generation
skills.description: Generates and updates .pptx slide decks so agents can assemble presentations from structured input data.
